market_sentiment.label: 中性
market_sentiment.summary: 資料更新中，請稍後再試

articles.title: New York sues Coinbase, Gemini over prediction market offerings
articles.description: New York has become the latest state to argue that prediction market contracts touching on sports and entertainment violate state gambling laws.

articles.title: Apple’s John Ternus will run one of the world’s most powerful companies; the job is a minefield
articles.description: Apple's top job comes with almost unrivaled power and money, but it comes with plenty of baggage, too.

articles.title: DoorDash to offer stablecoin payments to users via Tempo blockchain
articles.description: Tempo announced the integration of ”stablecoin-powered payment infrastructure” with DoorDash, Stripe, Paradigm, Coastal Bank and ARQ.

articles.title: Prediction markets are the new secret weapon for Coinbase and Robinhood growth
articles.description: Cantor Fitzgerald analysts said the market is treating recent trading slumps as old news, shifting focus instead toward prediction markets and new product launches to drive the next leg of growth for Coinbase and Robinhood.

articles.title: Blockchain.com adds perpetual futures trading to self-custody wallets
articles.description: With a CFTC greenlight expected soon, industry momentum is building for the derivative contracts still only available to non-US investors.

articles.title: Core Scientific seeks $3.3 billion bond sale to further AI data center pivot
articles.description: The company is building six AI data centers, leased to CoreWeave for 12 years, and is expected to generate approximately $10 billion in revenue.

articles.title: AI research lab NeoCognition lands $40M seed to build agents that learn like humans
articles.description: Founded by an OSU researcher, the startup is developing AI agents that can become experts in any domain.

articles.title: Mob boss John Gotti’s grandson is headed to prison for a $1.1 million Covid fraud and crypto scheme
articles.description: he mob boss’ grandson defrauded the U.S. government’s Covid-19 relief system out of $1.1 million and invested at least half of it to invest in crypto businesses.

articles.title: Apple’s Cal AI crackdown signals it’s still policing the App Store
articles.description: Apple tells TechCrunch Cal AI was removed not for web payments alone, but for deceptive billing, manipulative tactics, and App Store rule violations.

articles.title: SusHi Tech Tokyo isn’t a conference — it’s a deal room with 60,000 people
articles.description: When 60,000 attendees descend on Tokyo Big Sight April 27–29, the headline numbers are hard to ignore: 750 startup exhibitors, 151 sessions, city leaders from 49 countries. But the stat that tells you what kind of event this actually is? It's 10,000 facilitated business meetings — brokered, booked,

articles.title: ChatGPT’s new Images 2.0 model is surprisingly good at generating text
articles.description: ChatGPT Images 2.0, the newest image-generation model from OpenAI, shows just how much AI capabilities have evolved over the last few years.

articles.title: Sam Altman throws shade at Anthropic’s cyber model, Mythos: ‘fear-based marketing’
articles.description: This week, during a podcast appearance, OpenAI CEO Sam Altman called out his competitor's new cybersecurity model, noting that the company was using fear to make its product sound more impressive than it actually is.

articles.title: Crypto's massive exploit may force big banks to rethink their blockchain plans, Jefferies warns
articles.description: The $293 million Kelp DAO exploit has exposed critical infrastructure risks, leading Jefferies to suggest that traditional financial firms may pause their blockchain initiatives to prioritize security.

articles.title: Bitcoin inflows to Binance fall to 2023 low as BTC bulls set target on $80K
articles.description: Bitcoin inflows diverge across exchanges as selling pressure eases on Binance, while Coinbase shows more dominant activity.

articles.title: New York targets Coinbase, Gemini in fresh crackdown on prediction markets
articles.description: Attorney General Letitia James alleged that Coinbase and Gemini ran unlicensed markets, adding pressure on crypto companies as states move to regulate event-based trading platforms.

articles.title: A look at Tim Cook’s 15-year legacy as CEO of Apple
articles.description: Cook, who joined Apple in 1998, succeeded Steve Jobs as CEO in 2011 and went on to transform Apple into a $4 trillion powerhouse.

articles.title: Bitcoin slides toward $75,000 amid Warsh hearing, stalling U.S.-Iran talks
articles.description: The S&P 500 and Nasdaq gave back their early morning gains alongside BTC as markets digested the Fed Chair nominee's Senate confirmation hearing and report of stalled Iran talks.

articles.title: Kalshi takes on Coinbase, Robinhood with new plan to offer crypto perpetual futures: The Information
articles.description: Prediction market platform Kalshi is moving onto Coinbase’s turf by launching crypto perpetual futures, aiming to capture the massive demand for digital asset derivatives within a regulated U.S. framework.

articles.title: Nium taps Coinbase to add USDC into global payments network
articles.description: Nium integrates Coinbase’s infrastructure to enable USDC-based cross-border payments, allowing businesses to settle in fiat or stablecoins without relying on prefunded accounts.

articles.title: Clarifai deletes 3 million photos that OkCupid provided to train facial recognition AI, report says
articles.description: The photo deletion comes after an FTC settlement with Clarifai. The company had asked OkCupid — whose executives had invested in Clarifai — to share data in 2014, according to court documents.
